payload.text: I’ll inspect the current types, schema, storage defaults, Codex option mapping, and tests first so the changes line up with the existing patterns.

The current schema already has a `withDefault` helper, and Codex option mapping is centralized enough to split cleanly. I’m checking the relevant tests now so I can add coverage without reshaping unrelated fixtures.

I’ve got enough context. I’m going to make the schema/type/default changes first, then split the Codex thread option helpers so draft/update stay offline while implementation runs use the new opt-in settings, then I’ll add focused schema and backend coverage.
The config model now has the new fields with disk-decoding defaults. Next I’m changing the SDK option builders so the new network/search knobs are only read by implementation runs.

704:    const thread = codex.startThread(await threadOptionsForProject(projectPath));
1797:    const options = await threadOptionsForProject(projectPath);

The schema tests now cover legacy config decoding and enum validation. I’m adding runtime coverage next: implementation runs should forward the new options, while ticket-update runs should continue forcing offline/read-only settings.
Code and tests are patched. I’m running the TypeScript check first because the SDK option types will catch any mismatch in the new config fields.

payload.text:
**Summary**
Added SDK thread option config support with conservative defaults. Implementation runs now pass configured reasoning effort, additional directories, network access, and web search mode. Ticket draft and ticket update runs still force offline web/network behavior. `on-failure` is now accepted as a default approval policy.

**Files Changed**
- `src/shared/types.ts`
- `src/main/services/schemas.ts`
- `src/main/services/storage/index.ts`
- `src/main/services/codex/index.ts`
- `tests/schemas.test.ts`
- `tests/backend.test.ts`
- `tests/ticket-draft.test.ts`
- `tests/ticket-update.test.ts`

**Commands Run**
- Read/search commands: `sed`, `grep`, `nl`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm test`
- `git status --short`
- `git diff -- ...`

**Tests Run**
- `npm run typecheck`: passed
- `npm test`: passed, 102 tests
- Test run emitted the existing `import.meta` CJS warning from `src/main/services/codex/cli.ts`, but all tests passed.

**Remaining Risks / Follow-Up**
- No settings UI was added, per ticket scope.
- The worktree already contains unrelated modified `.relay`, UI, IPC, and test files; I left those untouched.

payload.finalResponse:
**Summary**
Added SDK thread option config support with conservative defaults. Implementation runs now pass configured reasoning effort, additional directories, network access, and web search mode. Ticket draft and ticket update runs still force offline web/network behavior. `on-failure` is now accepted as a default approval policy.

**Files Changed**
- `src/shared/types.ts`
- `src/main/services/schemas.ts`
- `src/main/services/storage/index.ts`
- `src/main/services/codex/index.ts`
- `tests/schemas.test.ts`
- `tests/backend.test.ts`
- `tests/ticket-draft.test.ts`
- `tests/ticket-update.test.ts`

**Commands Run**
- Read/search commands: `sed`, `grep`, `nl`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm test`
- `git status --short`
- `git diff -- ...`

**Tests Run**
- `npm run typecheck`: passed
- `npm test`: passed, 102 tests
- Test run emitted the existing `import.meta` CJS warning from `src/main/services/codex/cli.ts`, but all tests passed.

**Remaining Risks / Follow-Up**
- No settings UI was added, per ticket scope.
- The worktree already contains unrelated modified `.relay`, UI, IPC, and test files; I left those untouched.
